nasb.text: As for the pillars, the height of each pillar was eighteen cubits, and it was twelve cubits in circumference and four fingers in thickness, and hollow.

esv.text: As for the pillars, the height of the one pillar was eighteen cubits,  its circumference was twelve cubits, and its thickness was four fingers, and it was hollow.

cnv.text: 至於那些柱子，每根高八公尺，圓周是五公尺三公分，柱子是空心的。銅的厚度有七十五公釐。

ccb.text: 两根铜柱中空，高八米，周长五点三米，铜壁厚四指。
